case_title: YUAN LAN WONG VS. PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY WONG, YUAN LAN AS TO DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY, INC. SHAMIEH, TAGREED FADYA, SALFITI MSHASHA, SAMI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 (SHERIFF MISTAKENLY NAMED DEFT'S AGENT FOR SERVICE, INSTEAD OF DEFENDANT) SERVED JAN-26-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MSHASHA, SAMI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF YUAN LAN WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY SUSANA MACKENZIE, VICE PRESIDENT. DEFENDANTS SALFITI FADYA, TAGREED SHAMIEH AND SAMI MSHASHA ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, YUAN LAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAMIEH, TAGREED FADYA, SALFITI MSHASHA, SAMI $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,250.00, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AGAINST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT CONSULTING, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT A PROPER PARTY. DEFENDANTS SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1250.00 AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANTS HAVE ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. COSTS ARE NOT AWARDED AS DEFENDANTS EARNESTLY ATTEMPTED TO RESOLVE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT THOUGH THE HOA PROCESS PRIOR TO THE FILING OF PLAINTIFF'S LAWSUIT BUT WERE UNABLE TO DO SO. DEFENDANTS PROMPTLY PAID PLAINTIFF $1250.00 UPON RECEIPT OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
